content:
Financial   Report   2024                              
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
           Executive Summary                                                        
                                                                                    
           This is a native digital PDF created for testing document extraction. It contains structured text, tables,
           and proper formatting that should be easily extractable without OCR.     
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
           Revenue Breakdown                                                        
                                                                                    
                         Quarter Revenue   Expenses   Profit                        
                                                                                    
                           Q1      $100,000  $60,000  $40,000                       
                           Q2      $120,000  $65,000  $55,000                       
                                                                                    
                           Q3      $150,000  $70,000  $80,000                       
                           Q4      $180,000  $75,000  $105,000                      
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
           Analysis                                                                 
                                                                                    
           The company showed strong growth throughout the year with consistent quarter-over-quarter
           improvements. Revenue increased by 80% from Q1 to Q4, while maintaining healthy profit margins.
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
           Department Expenses                                                      
                                                                                    
                        Department  Budget   Actual Variance                        
                                                                                    
                          Engineering $50,000 $48,000 -$2,000                       
                          Marketing  $30,000 $32,000  +$2,000                       
                            Sales    $40,000 $38,000  -$2,000                       
                                                                                    
                          Operations $20,000 $19,000  -$1,000
